title: Whimscape x Overflowing Bars
description: Whimscape addon for Overflowing Bars mod
body:
[Whimscape](https://modrinth.com/mod/whimscape) resource pack addon that extends the original resource pack to support [Overflowing Bars](https://modrinth.com/mod/overflowing-bars) mod. The addon updates overlayed hearts and their colors, along with armor toughness icons and armor protection icons to follow the Whimscape's original style.

![GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d4b98f40528f5ff4bab5ca7630f96541064f6ba.png)
